name: What proof do I need before creating FAQ schema for AEO?
description: Use real customer questions, support data, sales objections, and search queries as evidence for which FAQs to include.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need before creating FAQ schema for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best evidence is real customer language. Use support tickets, sales objections, live chat transcripts, search data, and Google-style People Also Ask questions to find what people actually want answered. Strong FAQs usually reflect patterns you can prove are common.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use real customer questions, support data, sales objections, and search queries as evidence for which FAQs to include.
